articles.title: Stabilizing Ethereum Funding Rates Suggests Recovery Might Be In The Works
articles.description: Ethereum funding rates had taken a beating after the Merge was completed. articles.title: Helium Community Votes In Favor Of HIP 70 Solana Migration Proposal
